name: Statue of Anguish Pattern
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>苦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>様</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>土</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>像</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Rock-Type/EARTH/Level 7/ATK 0/DEF 2500). (This card is also still a Trap Card.) If Summoned this way, this card cannot be targeted by an opponent's card effects while you control another Trap Card that is a monster. If a card is Special Summoned from your Spell & Trap Zone to the Monster Zone while this card is a monster: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
eff: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Rock-Type/EARTH/Level 7/ATK 0/DEF 2500). (This card is also still a Trap Card.) If Summoned this way, this card cannot be targeted by an opponent's card effects while you control another Trap Card that is a monster. If a card is Special Summoned from your Spell & Trap Zone to the Monster Zone while this card is a monster: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.

mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
